title: A larger creative toolbox lands in the Greenhouse
summary:
A community harvest: dozens of new apps, fresh ways to earn Pollen, a Berlin night out, and quieter infrastructure underneath it all.

The app directory gained a substantial batch of creator-facing projects: fashion mockups from fabric references with MURI, real-time AI-generated card games with Crestbound TCG, live voice translation via Talkti, thumbnail planning with Thumbsnare, browser subtitle creation with SubCap, affiliate video tools, UGC ad concepts, and several image and illustration studios. A useful reminder that “image generation” has escaped the prompt box and acquired jobs.

The Greenhouse now includes story and social-writing tools, AI temperature controls, richer chat and Discord integrations, interactive book-to-game conversion, document-to-Markdown tooling, an interior-design generator, local event discovery, FDNY prep materials, a browser IDE, and study help built around personal notes. Also added: worst AI, which is exactly what it says on the label.

Pollinations AI Night in Berlin now has a dedicated /night page with RSVP details, channel attribution for organizers, and correctly sized social artwork for Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, and X. The landscape banner typo has also been removed from circulation, where it can no longer cause trouble.
